subcodes.first_line: Through the grace and tender mercy of the loving Lord, we beseech that His eminence Shapur may, like Shapur of old, gain sovereignty over the realms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب شاپور از فضل و عنایت پروردگار مهربان میطلبیم که چون شاپور مستولی بر ممالک
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
